mapper.select: select count(*) from t_lecture_tm where open_yn = 'Y'
select count(*) from t_lecture where open_yn = 'Y'

select a.* ,(SELECT COUNT(T.USER_ID) FROM t_lecture_rcept T WHERE T.STATE != 'C' AND T.EDU_SEQ = A.EDU_SEQ ) AS RCEPT_CNT from t_lecture a where open_yn = 'Y'
order by rcept_period_begin LIMIT #{firstIndex}, #{row}
